Title: User successfully signs up and logs in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter valid user information.
3. Click on the sign-up button.
4. Verify that the user is created successfully.
5. Log in using the same credentials.
6. Verify that the user is logged in.
Expected Result: User is successfully signed up and logged in.

Title: User fails to sign up due to invalid email format
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter invalid email format.
3. Click on the sign-up button.
4. Verify that the sign-up fails.
Expected Result: Sign-up fails due to invalid email format.

Title: User fails to sign up due to existing username
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter existing username.
3. Click on the sign-up button.
4. Verify that the sign-up fails.
Expected Result: Sign-up fails due to existing username.

Title: User successfully logs in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter valid login credentials.
3. Click on the login button.
4. Verify that the user is logged in.

Title: User fails to log in due to invalid password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter valid username but incorrect password.
3. Click on the login button.
4. Verify that the login fails.
Expected Result: Login fails due to incorrect password.

Title: User fails to log in due to non-existent username
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter non-existent username.
3. Click on the login button.
4. Verify that the login fails.
Expected Result: Login fails due to non-existent username.

Title: User successfully creates an announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement creation page.
2. Enter valid announcement details.
3. Click on the create announcement button.
4. Verify that the announcement is created successfully.

Title: User fails to create an announcement due to missing required fields
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement creation page.
2. Enter missing required fields.
3. Click on the create announcement button.
4. Verify that the announcement creation fails.
Expected Result: Announcement creation fails due to missing required fields.

Title: User successfully filters announcements
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are announcements available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement listing page.
2. Apply valid filter criteria.
3. Verify that the filtered announcements are displayed.

Title: User fails to filter announcements due to invalid filter criteria
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are announcements available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement listing page.
2. Apply invalid filter criteria.
3. Verify that the filtering fails.
Expected Result: Filtering fails due to invalid filter criteria.

Title: User successfully views an announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are announcements available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement listing page.
2. Select a valid announcement ID.
3. Click on the view announcement button.
4. Verify that the announcement details are displayed.

Title: User fails to view an announcement due to invalid announcement ID
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are announcements available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement listing page.
2. Select an invalid announcement ID.
3. Click on the view announcement button.
4. Verify that the announcement viewing fails.
Expected Result: Viewing of the announcement fails due to invalid announcement ID.
